name: playwright
description: Playwright MCP bridge scaffold for the edgars-mcp plugin registry.

interface.shortDescription: Playwright MCP preset for general browser automation and testing.
interface.longDescription: Registers the official Playwright MCP server so edgars-mcp can expose a standard browser automation option for scripted flows, QA, and repeatable interaction tests.
defaultPrompt: Use Playwright to validate this flow end to end.
Open the page and capture a browser automation trace.
Run a quick browser interaction test with Playwright.
